signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Goes Live on Solana via Hex Trust and LayerZero, with Ethereum Interoperability Confirmed and Expansi
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Goes Live on Solana via Hex Trust and LayerZero, with Ethereum Interoperability Confirmed and Expansion Underway | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Solana officially posted a teaser video captioned "XRP" and referenced signing **589 NDAs**, fueling speculation tied to XRP's "589" price narrative and cross-chain hype, which drove immediate price gains (SOL +3%, XRP +1.56%) [1].
